hypothesis: Concrete eBPF Modification:* Replace standard `BPF_JMP_REG` (specifically `BPF_JLT` or `BPF_JGT`) instructions used in pivot comparisons with a branchless sequence of `BPF_SUB`, `BPF_RSH` (to extract the sign bit as a mask), and `BPF_AND` / `BPF_OR` bitwise instructions. This computes the destination memory offsets directly into a register (`BPF_ALU64_REG`), allowing the eBPF JIT compiler to emit branchless `cmov` (conditional move) x86 instructions.
